arts.ttl: Hull City manager latest as Acun Ilicali makes next big decision
arts.sum: Hull Live understands from sources involved in the search for Walter's successor that Ilicali has told those involved in the process there is no pressure to rush into making a permanent appointment, and while there is an understanding that it can't drag on for any longer than necessary, he is prepared to wait to ensure they get the right man. Ilicali made the big decision to sack Tim Walter after Tuesday night's 2-0 home defeat to Sheffield Wednesday, which sparked a furious reaction from supporters, who called for the German's sacking after a run of nine games without a win, including four straight defeats which has left them entrenched in the bottom three.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough vs Hull City predictions: Boro to dominate troubled Tigers
arts.sum: Aidan Perkins believes Middlesbrough can bounce back from their midweek defeat to Blackburn with a victory over Hull City in the Championship on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Potential Middlesbrough transfer focus emerges as one player continues to struggle
arts.sum: Replaced by Micah Hamilton as Delano Burgzorg also missed out through illness, the summer signing from Manchester City continued to struggle to make an impact in a Boro shirt. Boro missed a number of key players on Wednesday evening, but it's fair to say the most impactful absentee was Finn Azaz.

arts.ttl: Preview: Middlesbrough vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Middlesbrough and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: What Hull City's decision to sack Tim Walter means for Middlesbrough ahead of Riverside clash
arts.sum: But with Tigers legend Dawson preparing for a second caretaker stint in charge, it's likely Boro will face a very different, albeit still fragile, Hull City this weekend. Northallerton-born coach Andy Dawson will be in interim charge of Hull City on Saturday at the Riverside after the Tigers' decision to sack head coach Tim Walter.

arts.ttl: Ex-Hull City star Curtis Davies names his two star men for vacant manager role
arts.sum: Cooper was spoken to during the summer but made it clear that he wanted a Premier League job, and that eventually came, but it ended last week when the Foxes sacked him after 12 games, and Davies believes either of those would make an excellent appointment, if Acun Ilicali could pull it off. On the subject of Walter's demise, Davies again reiterated his belief that the players were not buying in the system, based on what he saw both in games, and on his visit to the club's training ground earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Hull City identify 56-year-old as top candidate to replace Tim Walter
arts.sum: Hull City have identified Slavisa Jokanovic as the early leading contender to replace Tim Walter as their new… The post Hull City identify 56-year-old as top candidate to replace Tim Walter appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
